scripts.app: npm run build -w @ulanzideck/catalog && npm run dev -w @ulanzideck/store-desktop
scripts.app:build: npm run build -w @ulanzideck/catalog && npm run build -w @ulanzideck/store-desktop
scripts.app:dist: npm run build -w @ulanzideck/catalog && npm run dist -w @ulanzideck/store-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ulanzideck/catalog && npm run typecheck -w @ulanzideck/store-desktop
scripts.build: npm run catalog:build && npm run app:build
